prediction.reasoning: PepsiCo is a stable consumer staples stock with low volatility. Based on historical price movements, PEP typically exhibits daily volatility around 1-1.5%. Over 21 days, this translates to expected price movements of roughly 4-6% in either direction for normal market conditions. The slight positive bias in the point estimate reflects the general upward trend of large-cap consumer staples stocks over medium-term horizons, supported by dividend reinvestment and steady business fundamentals. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming approximately normal distribution of returns with annualized volatility around 20%.
